purpose: Activity Log entry — 2026-05-14 strategic decision: Sovereign Phoenix takeover sequencing + Kader untrust thesis

text.content: Sovereign Phoenix takeover sequencing — Luis HF cleanup gate + 3-month exclusive countdown

Three months remain on Sovereign Phoenix exclusive contract — hard countdown to acquisition. Takeover must be COMPLETE (no room for existing management to siphon funds or sabotage). Sequencing change: Luis must first clean up his bad-standing history with Healthfirst (HF may re-interview owners under new mgmt and use any unresolved past issues as a reason to drop the contract). ONLY AFTER Luis cleanup is complete do we gather Aaron + Ahmed + DocPro for the purchase/rewire conversation. Kader untrust thesis confirmed: no transparency on numbers + dishonest dealings = the explicit reason we cut business to SAIPA. Cannot be involved in clean takeover.

(1) Confirm with Luis that HF-standing cleanup is underway and define done-criteria. (2) Set countdown checkpoint: re-evaluate at 60-day mark (~2026-07-14) — if Luis cleanup not done, escalate. (3) DO NOT schedule full Aaron+Ahmed+DocPro+Luis purchase meeting until cleanup gate clears. (4) Surface in every /start-day until takeover complete or contract expires (~2026-08-14).
